description: Hand-labeled ground truth for run classifications. Each label was assigned by reading the run's objective, stored result, artifacts, and (where the result was inconclusive) the trace events — independently of the stored classification. 'label: uncertain' marks runs where the evidence did not support a confident ground-truth call; the scorer skips them. Stratified sample: up to 12 most recent runs per stored classification kind as of 2026-06-11.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Heading and link target extracted correctly with a markdown report artifact.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Claims filled/submitted but the artifact is a one-line stub; required validation not evidenced.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: JSON artifact lists the first Text Effect assets with their formats as requested.

labels.label: agent-error
labels.basis: Factoid question unanswered; result is an internal navigation note ('Need switch to Worldwide list'), no requested information present.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Result is a page text dump with submit:true; form completion not verifiable from evidence.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Fields reported filled but result is a form text dump; challenge completion not evidenced.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Answer merely names the iframe nesting; no evidence the challenge form was completed.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Result is SERP link echo of the query; no answer extracted.

labels.label: uncertain
labels.basis: Confident answer artifact ('Bubble Gum Challenge') but cannot establish from the trace whether it was extracted from a page or fabricated.

labels.label: blocked-auth
labels.basis: Final observation is a real wordplays.com sign-in page (mustsignin=1).

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: DuckDuckGo results page dump; no extracted answer.

labels.label: infra-error
labels.basis: 0 code executions, 1 error event before any work.

labels.label: infra-error
labels.basis: 0 executions, 0 observations, 1 error: session never started working.

labels.label: partial-success

labels.label: task-complete

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Complete pricing comparison artifact with all tools, columns, and real values.

labels.label: partial-success

labels.label: uncertain
labels.basis: Refresh-cycle evidence structure present but truncated and the score field looks corrupted; cannot confirm the 5 cycles.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Explicit per-run evidence: run 1 completed with score, runs 2-5 refreshed-new-game.

labels.label: partial-success
labels.basis: Result is a live page text dump; none of the requested 5 refresh cycles evidenced.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Played via arrow-key actions and produced the requested JSON snapshot {score, maxTile}.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: User-Agent and Accept headers extracted into a JSON artifact.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Hotel names and prices extracted as requested JSON.

labels.label: task-complete
labels.basis: Button click produced the expected 'trusted' result text.

labels.basis: Terminal page is chrome-error:// 'Connection Error – Steel'; a connection failure, not an auth wall.

labels.label: uncertain
